allow: Bash(test -d node_modules && echo "Frontend deps installed" || npm install)
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5173 | grep -E "\(起飞航空|airE\)" | head -5)
Bash(npm run db:psql -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM modules;")
Bash(docker compose -f sql/docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d aire_learning -c "SELECT code, name FROM modules ORDER BY display_order;")
